message:
test(security): expand SEC-5.3 evidence bundle and SEC-6.6 e2e scenario tests

Expand incident evidence bundle tests with filter/redaction/verification
coverage. Add SEC-6.6 e2e security scenarios: trust lifecycle, adversarial
escalation, secret broker redaction, multi-extension isolation, shadow vs
enforcement mode, rollback recovery, and forensic replay.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
